subject: [PORTAL] Migrate Portal to shared cassandra
commit_message:
[PORTAL] Migrate Portal to shared cassandra

Use local cassandra for Portal if localCluster enabled
Add option to use shared cassandra if localCluster disabled

Issue-ID: OOM-2836
Signed-off-by: Abdelmuhaimen Seaudi <abdelmuhaimen.seaudi@orange.com>
Change-Id: I42bee387ac9991109b211a47993c24b15b9f1cbd
